vfkb.text: Config files use JSON format (`.config.json`), loaded via `src/config.ts`.
Config files use JSON (not YAML). Format is `.cliconfig.json` loaded via Node's built-in `fs` + `JSON.parse` in `src/config.ts`.

Config files use JSON (not YAML). Loader is src/config.ts; reads config.json from CWD by default, returns {} if absent. Why: JSON requires zero extra dependencies (Node.js built-in JSON.parse), the project already uses .json files (mcp.json, settings.json), and a small CLI benefits from a minimal dependency footprint. YAML was ruled out because it requires an external parser (js-yaml / yaml) for no meaningful benefit at this scale.
